name: BrightView Holdings, Inc.
description: BrightView Holdings, Inc. is the largest provider of commercial landscaping services in the United States. The company provides a comprehensive suite of services, including landscape maintenance, enhancement, design, and construction, as well as snow and ice management. Serving a diverse range of clients such as corporate campuses, HOAs, hospitality venues, and educational institutions, BrightView operates through a network of local branches across the country, delivering high-quality, dependable outdoor solutions.
